title: Created Date column always shows "now" when migrate data through monday API
excerpt:

On create new item on board, it always show “now” on created date column although I have different dates for th…

posts.author: onurbolaca (Onur)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to put new data into monday boards (quotes and accounts) through API, through make (integromat),

On create new item on board, it always show “now” on created date column although I have different dates for that column.

How to manage this?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @onurbolaca,

Can you please share with me the mutation you are using to populate the date column?

Cheers,
Matias
